full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: I need to write a 4 page report covering 5 sections. How should I split the space? I usually overwrite on technical parts and underwrite on reflection.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested roughly equal space since all sections carry equal marks. Give extra attention to the reflection section since it's the hardest to write well and most differentiating.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: All 5 report sections are 3 marks each, so equal weight makes sense.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Condensing my method description for the report
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me summarize the step-by-step method description from Task 1.1 into one short paragraph for the report. It needs to hit the key points: input transformation, time-marked kernel, causal warping, GP inference.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided a draft structure. I then rewrote it in my own words based on my implementation experience.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: The final paragraph includes implementation insights that only come from having built the code.

top_5_prompts.prompt: How should I split 4 pages across the 5 report sections?
Help me condense my method description into one paragraph for the report.
top_5_prompts.why_important: Writing concisely within 4 pages requires summarization help.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 4.1.
